MOVEMENT_ALLOWANCE.OverrideHint: Leave empty to use the world default. Units match the scene grid.
MOVEMENT_ALLOWANCE.ExemptLabel: Exempt this token from allowance limits

Settings.enabledHint: When off, tokens move freely with no restrictions.
Settings.gmMoveHint: When on, only the GM can move tokens without spending allowance. Players are still restricted.
Settings.defaultAllowanceHint: Maximum distance per turn for tokens without a per-actor override. Uses scene distance units.
Settings.scopeHint: Player characters only, or every token in the scene.
Settings.resetScopeHint: Whether End turn affects only this scene or all scenes.
Settings.barVisibilityHint: Applies to tokens that display movement allowance on a resource bar. Owner: GM and token owners. All: everyone.
Settings.exemptTypesHint: Actor types (from the active system) that never use movement allowance.
